objective: dogfood Campfire on itself and harden lifecycle verification coverage

current.milestone_title: Add a reusable automation-pattern reference for recurring Codex App runs
current.slice_title: Add the automation-pattern reference and keep it generic for recurring Campfire runs
acceptance_criteria: Campfire provides a reusable reference for automation-ready prompts that pair with the task-state contract
The repo contains deterministic evidence or example coverage for automation-ready workflow guidance
README and self-hosted task state describe when to use recurring automations versus one-off rolling runs

queued_milestones.milestone_title: Add deterministic verification or example coverage for automation-ready prompts and workspace guidance
Document recurring automation patterns in README and example guidance

execution.notes: Dynamic queue replenishment is enabled. The next backlog focuses on recurring Codex App automation patterns while keeping Campfire generic.

last_run.summary: Corrected rolling semantics so auto-advance and bounded reframe are recorded as run events instead of terminal stop reasons, then paused with milestone-018 still active.
last_run.next_step: Add the automation-pattern reference, then cover automation-ready prompts and workspace guidance.

validation.summary: Replenished the rolling queue with the next automation-pattern backlog.
Recorded the rolling stop-reason fix so auto-advance and bounded reframe remain mid-run events.
Framed the next rolling backlog around stop conditions other than success.
Rolling execution verifier now treats auto-advance as a run event and pauses for a real terminal reason.
Rolling reframe verifier now treats bounded reframe as a run event and preserves the replenished queue.
Repo verification passed after the rolling stop-reason semantics fix.
Evaluation note confirms the worktree-aware backlog is complete.
